name: Kindergarten Engineering — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for testing, improving, and explaining a small solution. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with testing, improving, and explaining a small solution.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about testing, improving, and explaining a small solution through a close look at testing, improving, and explaining a small solution.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about testing, improving, and explaining a small solution through a guided practice with testing, improving, and explaining a small solution.

activities.title: A close look at testing, improving, and explaining a small solution
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at testing, improving, and explaining a small solution, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in testing, improving, and explaining a small solution.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
